summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of CV portfolio for Jhonatan Villalba. All features working perfectly including new contact bubble/sidebar functionality, navigation colors, and updated theme.

ui_bugs.issue: Contact bubble click intercepted by Emergent badge overlay in some cases
ui_bugs.workaround: JavaScript click works perfectly, only Playwright direct click affected

passed_tests: Light theme confirmed - background color rgb(250, 250, 250)
Profile photo displays Jhonatan's actual face correctly centered
Navigation with 3 buttons (Formación, Experiencia, Habilidades) working correctly
Contact bubble opens sidebar with all contact information (email, phone, location, birthday)
Contact sidebar shows all required information and closes properly
Navigation colors change correctly - Formación (green), Experiencia (blue), Habilidades (purple)
Experience section shows 5 cards with 4 company logos at full width
Education section shows 4 cards with 4 institution logos
Experience and education modals open and close correctly
Skills section displays 7 skill categories with proper colors
All sections transition smoothly with proper animations
